name: All Time Best Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped nuts (e.g., pecans or walnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine cocoa powder, flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt.
3. In another bowl, whisk together eggs, vanilla extract, and oil until well combined.
4. Gradually add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in the grated carrots and crushed pineapple.
6. Pour the batter into three greased 9-inch round cake pans.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool the cakes in the pans on wire racks.
8. Icing: In a large bowl, beat cream cheese and butter until smooth. Gradually add powdered sugar, mixing well. Stir in coconut flakes and chopped nuts.
9. Once the cakes have cooled completely, spread icing evenly over each layer.
10. Refrigerate the finished cake until ready to serve.
